question: Is the image presented as a diptych with two distinct panels side-by-side?
Are both Foucault pendulum installations viewed from a directly overhead (top-down) perspective?
Do both panels clearly display circular graduated floor markings?
Is a pendulum bob clearly visible in each panel?
Are swing trajectory indicators visible on the floor in both panels?
Are floor arrows present in both panels to denote the direction of rotation of the swing plane?
In the left panel (representing Paris/Northern Hemisphere), do the floor arrows indicate a clockwise rotation?
In the right panel (representing Sydney/Southern Hemisphere), do the floor arrows indicate a counter-clockwise rotation?
Are the circular markings, arrows, and pendulum components clear and legible without severe blurring?
